backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (user profiles, workout templates, phases, exercises, logs) and their in-memory state maps, with migration applied on upgrade and authorization mixin included.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms actor state on upgrade by adding a `creator` field to each `UserWorkoutTemplatePersistent` record, mapping old template format to the new format.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs to their implementing files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels for features like template name editing, deletion, and related mutation hooks.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key behaviors of components, pages, and hooks in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base styles and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with seven routes (history, add workout, progression, templates, phases, local templates, workout log), wraps the app in ThemeProvider, and renders a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CreateTemplateFo: Form component for creating a new workout template by name, with actor-readiness checks, loading indicators, and toast notifications for success or specific error messages.
Displays a detail view for a specific exercise, allowing users to log sets/reps/weight with unit conversion and showing past log entries.
frontend/src/components/ExerciseSelector: A simple dropdown component for selecting an exercise from a provided list of exercise names.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a hero header, sticky navigation bar with auth-gated links, and an Outlet for child routes.
frontend/src/components/LocalTemplateDet: Shows details of a local workout template and provides a form to add exercises (with sets, reps, weight, and duration) to it.
frontend/src/components/LogEntryForm.tsx: Form for logging actual workout performance against a template, allowing users to fill in actual sets/reps/weight and mark the workout as complete.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
Displays exercises within a training phase, supports adding/removing exercises, and navigates into an ExerciseLogView for individual exercise logging.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that appears for authenticated users without a profile, allowing them to enter their name and preferred weight unit (lbs/kg) to create their profile.
frontend/src/components/ProgressionChart: A card component that renders tabbed line/bar charts (volume, weight, reps, sets) showing an exercise's performance over time using Recharts, with weight unit conversion support.
frontend/src/components/TemplateCreateFo: A form component for creating a new local workout template with a name and one or more exercises (sets, reps, weight, duration, notes), saving via the useCreateLocalTemplate hook.
frontend/src/components/TemplateDetailVi: A detail view for a backend workout template that lists its exercises and scheduled days, and provides an inline form to add new exercises to the template.
frontend/src/components/WeightUnitToggle: A small toggle button group that lets the user switch their preferred weight unit between lbs and kg, persisting the change via the save profile mutation.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutEntryForm: A form card for logging a new workout session, collecting day, exercise name, sets, reps, weight (converted to lbs before storage), duration, and notes, then submitting via the useAddWorkout hook.
frontend/src/components/WorkoutHistoryLi: Displays a user's workout history grouped by day of the week, showing exercise details like weight (converted to user's preferred unit), sets, reps, and volume in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddExerciseToPhase: Mutation hook that adds a named exercise to a given phase via the backend actor and invalidates the exercises query for that phase on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddExerciseToTempl: Mutation hook that adds an exercise to a workout template via the backend actor and invalidates the allWorkoutTemplates query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddWorkout.ts: Mutation hook that submits a WorkoutSession to the backend and invalidates the workoutHistory query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePhase.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new training phase by name via the backend actor and invalidates the phases query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateWorkoutTempl: Mutation hook that creates a workout template via the backend actor with detailed error handling for auth and backend failures, invalidating allWorkoutTemplates on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePhase.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a phase by ID via the backend actor and invalidates the phases query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteWorkoutTempl: Mutation hook that deletes a workout template by ID via the backend actor and invalidates the allWorkoutTemplates query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllWorkoutTempl: Query hook that fetches all workout templates from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend, exposing combined loading state from both the actor and the query.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetExerciseLogs.ts: Query hook that fetches and returns exercise logs for a given exercise ID sorted by date descending, enabled only when the actor and exercise ID are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetExercisesForPha: Query hook that fetches all exercises belonging to a specific phase from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPhases.ts: Query hook that fetches all training phases from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, status flags, and auth actions.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalLogs.ts: Collection of query and mutation hooks for managing workout logs in localStorage, supporting read, update actuals, mark complete, and delete operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalTemplates.ts: Collection of query and mutation hooks for managing workout templates in localStorage, supporting read, create, update, and delete operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useLogExercise.ts: Mutation hook that logs sets, reps, and weight for a specific exercise via the backend actor and invalidates the corresponding exercise logs query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating that all query logic has been moved to individual hook files.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveExercise.ts: Mutation hook that removes an exercise by ID via the backend actor and invalidates the exercises query for the associated phase on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook that saves the current user's profile to the backend and invalidates the currentUserProfile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUpdateWorkoutTempl: React Query mutation hook that calls the backend `updateTemplateName` method and invalidates the `allWorkoutTemplates` cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useWorkoutHistory.ts: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's workout history from the backend and returns it sorted in reverse chronological order.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system, plus base heading styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query, Internet Identity, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AddWorkoutPage.tsx: Page that renders a login prompt for unauthenticated users or the `WorkoutEntryForm` component for authenticated users to log a new workout session.
frontend/src/pages/LocalTemplatesPage.ts: Page for managing locally-stored workout templates, supporting list, create, and detail views with inline name editing and delete confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/PhasesPage.tsx: Page for managing training phases, allowing authenticated users to create, delete, and navigate into phase detail views, with a login gate for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressionPage.tsx: Page that displays exercise progression charts for authenticated users, with exercise selection and auto-selection of the first exercise from workout history.
frontend/src/pages/TemplateLibraryPage.t: Page for managing backend-stored workout templates, supporting create, inline rename, delete with confirmation, and a detail view for each template.
frontend/src/pages/WorkoutHistoryPage.ts: Page that shows a login prompt for unauthenticated users or renders the `WorkoutHistoryList` component displaying all logged workouts.
frontend/src/pages/WorkoutLogPage.tsx: React page that displays a list of workout logs with filter tabs (all/incomplete/completed), summary stats, and delete functionality, switching to a detail view via LogEntryForm when a log is selected.
frontend/src/utils/localStorageLogs.ts: Defines WorkoutLog and LogExercise interfaces and provides CRUD utility functions (get, create, update, complete, delete) for persisting workout logs in localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/localStorageTemplates: Defines WorkoutTemplate and TemplateExercise interfaces and provides validated CRUD utility functions for persisting workout templates in localStorage, auto-creating a log entry on template creation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/weightConversion.ts: Provides helper functions to convert weights between lbs and kg, format numeric weight values, and display stored lbs values in a user-specified unit.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that enables dark mode, registers typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and extends the theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), fonts, border radii, shadows, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state version 3, summarizing existing features for template management including create, inline name editing, and delete with confirmation for both on-chain and localStorage templates. Records feature IDs, titles, requirement IDs, and architectural notes.
